chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 430 of 2017 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.2043/2017. 2. For hearing of main case. 12.03.2025 Mr. Yousuf Ali, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Fahad Hussain Arijo, advocate for the respondent/SRB. Mr. Imran Ahmed Khan Abro, Assistant Advocate General Sindh. Per learned counsel show cause notice has been impugned herein, and the petitioner shall contest the same before the issuing authority. Learned counsel seeks that the notice be adjudicated vide a speaking order, after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner and pending aforesaid, no further coercive action be taken there against. Counsel for the respondent articulates no cavil to the aforesaid and states that petition may be disposed of in the aforesaid terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
